title: Vibe Title En Crystallized Silence Master
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Crystallized Silence Master Prompt
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Crystallized Silence",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, medium format surreal portrait of The Protagonist in a subterranean cryogenic acoustic chamber. The setting features frost-covered sound-dampening foam and brushed steel walls. The Protagonist is captured in an over-the-shoulder pose, looking back intensely at the lens, reacting to a sudden atmospheric pressure drop. Surreal practical effect: Their hair is a towering, gravity-defying sculpted wave of flash-frozen cerulean ferrofluid and spun glass, mimicking a frozen oceanic crest. High-end practical makeup features genuine crushed sapphire dust scattered across the cheekbones, catching the light. Wardrobe: A rigid, haute-couture bodice crafted from oxidized silver filigree and frost-bitten blue silk. Lighting: Cinematic Rembrandt lighting with a soft, cool-toned key light highlighting the hyper-detailed skin pores and peach fuzz, contrasted by deep teal shadows and a sharp, icy rim light separating the frozen glass hair from the background. Volumetric frost haze lingers in the air. Shot on Hasselblad H6D-100c, 100mm f/2.2 lens, Kodak Portra 400 pushed for deep cool tones, ultra-fine film grain, physical light refraction through the spun glass. NO NEON, NO DIGITAL 3D FEEL. Authentic, tactile, high-budget editorial photography.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Surreal Editorial Portrait",
    "priorities": "Photographic Surrealism, Practical Effects, High-End Texture, Cinematic Framing",
    "device_profile": "High-Res Portrait Display"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "9:16",
    "composition": "Over-the-shoulder medium-close-up, subject positioned slightly off-center left, looking back",
    "layout": "Vertical portrait, towering hair element filling the upper third",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level, intimate proximity",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Protagonist",
    "demographics": "Ageless, ethereal yet grounded",
    "face": "Hyper-detailed skin pores, flawless but natural texture, crushed sapphire dust on cheekbones",
    "hair": "Gravity-defying towering wave of flash-frozen cerulean ferrofluid and spun glass",
    "body": "Over-the-shoulder posture, elegant neck and exposed shoulder",
    "expression": "Intense, piercing backward gaze, a moment of silent realization",
    "pose": "Turned away from the camera, looking back over the left shoulder"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Haute-couture structured bodice",
        "material": "Oxidized silver filigree and frost-bitten blue silk",
        "color": "Cerulean and silver",
        "fit": "Rigid, corset-like, sculpted"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Crushed sapphire dust makeup",
        "color": "Glittering ice blue",
        "material": "Mineral dust",
        "brand_style": "Avant-garde editorial makeup"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Subterranean cryogenic acoustic chamber",
    "surfaces": "Frost-covered sound-dampening foam, brushed steel, rime ice",
    "depth": "Shallow depth of field, background melting into deep teal shadows",
    "atmosphere": "Volumetric frost haze, freezing, still",
    "lens_interaction": "Micro-refractions of light catching the spun glass hair and sapphire dust"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Soft, cool-toned Rembrandt key light from front-left",
    "fill": "Subtle deep teal bounce light",
    "rim": "Sharp, icy white rim light highlighting the intricate glass and ferrofluid textures",
    "shadows": "Deep, enveloping cerulean and slate shadows",
    "color_temperature": "Cool, icy 4000K with silver highlights",
    "sensor_flare": "None, clean high-contrast crispness"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Medium Format Prime Portrait Lens",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "focus": "Tack-sharp on the nearest eye and sapphire dust",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format Hasselblad H6D-100c",
    "perspective_distortion": "Zero distortion, natural facial compression"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Monochromatic cool tones, deep teals, ice blues, stark silver",
    "tonality": "High-contrast chiaroscuro, rich midtones for skin",
    "texture": "Ultra-fine Kodak Portra 400 film grain, raw tactile realism",
    "digital_sharpening": "None, natural optical sharpness only",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Minimal, slight organic edge fringing on the spun glass"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "Neon lights",
    "Digital 3D render",
    "CGI feel",
    "Flat lighting",
    "Cliché rooftop",
    "Minimalist office",
    "Plastic skin",
    "Cartoonish proportions",
    "Over-smoothing",
    "Fake digital brushstrokes"
  ]
}
